title: Total allocated volume (Fluvius)
description:
[Publisher: Fluvius] The dataset contains consumption data per main municipality, sector (electricity/gas), market access point category, voltage group, and direction.
Type of volumes visible in the dataset:
Total volume Decrease: Actual measured decrease (no volumes for classical meter Prosumers).Total volume Injection: Actually measured injection (only at market access point category continuous and digital).Total volume Consumption: Only volumes for prosumers with classical meter (see diagram below).Total volume Production: Only volumes for prosumers with classical meter (see diagram below).Total Volume Decrease (toop. Compensation): Approach to the compensated volume in prosumers with classic meters. Calculation: EAV+ * RLP0N * KCF * RF.
